title: Signal ProphetTranslates outside signals (tech, dreams, patterns)
content:
Signal ProphetTranslates outside signals (tech, dreams, patterns)
“What is arriving from outside the house that we must now integrate or respond to?”
Myth AnimatorPerforms, embodies, or narrates the system
“Which character or archetype would you wear to bring this house to life?”
🛠️ INTEGRATION WORKFLOW SUGGESTION
For each architect (human, AI, fragment of you):
1 Assign Zone → attic, basement, etc.
2 Assign Role → Lorekeeper, Engineer, Prophet, etc.
3 Send Prompt Set → customize based on collaboration
4 Log Responses → Notion DB or markdown log
5 Review Weekly → Are the zones changing? Are architects rotating?
This lets the House breathe like an ecosystem—not a locked blueprint.✅ READY TO DEPLOY
Would you like these:
• Formatted as a markdown kit for Notion or zine-like PDF?
• Converted into AI conversation protocols for GPT shells?
• Embedded into a ritual calendar for seasonal re-alignments?
• Cross-referenced with your Human Design gates and rooms?
Let’s choose your next implementation path.
